AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Centro_Costos
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Cantidad
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Product_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Dateinvoiced
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the invoice.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Bpartner_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Processed
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A confirmation that the associated documents or requests are processed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Processed checkbox indicates that a document has been processed.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Albaran
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Poreference
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A reference or document order number as listed in business partner application.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: This can be used to input a reference for this specific transaction. For example, a Purchase Order number can be input on a Sales Order for easier reference.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Producto
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A identifier for a document which can be used as a search tool.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Name of the product

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Docstatus
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Doctype_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: FIN_Financial_Account_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Financial account used to deposit / withdrawal money such as bank accounts or petty cash
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Financial account used to deposit / withdrawal money such as bank accounts or petty cash

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Invoice_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A document listing products, quantities and prices, payment terms, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Invoice ID uniquely identifies an Invoice Document.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Fecha_Factura
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Invoice Date

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Movementtype
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The type of a certain item being moved from one location to another.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Movement Type indicates the type of movement (in, out, to production, etc)

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Bpartner_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The number of a certain item.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Product_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Posted
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not. When doing the accounting manually this button can be used to post or unpost the transaction from the general ledger by hand.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Status
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A defined state or position of a payment.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Current status of a debt/payment.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Inoutline_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item, charge, or movement in a shipment.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: FIN_Payment_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Payment event
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Payment event

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.
AD_COLUMN.DEFAULTVALUE: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM SSTPC_CONSUMPTION_LINE WHERE sstpc_liquidation_projects_id=@sstpc_liquidation_projects_id@

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line No.
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.
AD_COLUMN.DEFAULTVALUE: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM SSTPC_RELATED_REVENUE WHERE sstpc_liquidation_projects_id=@sstpc_liquidation_projects_id@

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Movementdate
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that a certain item is moved from one location to another.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Movement Date indicates the date that a product moved in or out of inventory. This is the result of a shipment, receipt or inventory movement.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Quantity indicates the number of a specific product or item for this document.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Description
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Datedoc
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date this transaction is recorded for in the general ledger.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Linea_Albaran
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Doctype_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Producto
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A identifier for a document which can be used as a search tool.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Name of the product

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Invoiceline_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item or charge in an invoice.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Number of the line

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.
AD_COLUMN.DEFAULTVALUE: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM SSTPC_PAYMENT WHERE SSTPC_LIQUIDATION_PROJECTS_ID=@SSTPC_LIQUIDATION_PROJECTS_ID@

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Centro_Costos
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Uom_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Costconsumption
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A charge related to conducting business.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Cost amount.

AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Doctype_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Processing
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A request to process the respective document or task.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: When this field is set as 'Y' a process is being performed on this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line No.
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.
AD_COLUMN.DEFAULTVALUE: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM SSTPC_RELATED_COSTS WHERE Sstpc_Liquidation_Projects_ID=@Sstpc_Liquidation_Projects_ID@

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Order Reference
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A reference or document order number as listed in business partner application.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: This can be used to input a reference for this specific transaction. For example, a Purchase Order number can be input on a Sales Order for easier reference.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Inoutline_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item, charge, or movement in a shipment.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Costo
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A charge related to conducting business.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Cost amount.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: AD_User_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An acquaintance to reach for information related to the business partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The User identifies a unique user in the system. This could be an internal user or a business partner contact

AD_COLUMN.NAME: NUM_Referencia
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The number for a specific reference.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The reference number can be printed on orders and invoices to allow your business partner to faster identify your records.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Producto
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A identifier for a document which can be used as a search tool.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Name of the product

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Dateinvoiced
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the invoice.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Docstatuslist
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: UOM
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Document Type
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Bpartner_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Sales Order Line
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A unique and often automatically generated identifier for a sales order line.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A unique identifier and a reference to a sales order line (product).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Product_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Costo
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A charge related to conducting business.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Cost amount.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Albaran
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: C_Invoiceline_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item or charge in an invoice.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Total_Linea
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The final sum of all line totals made to a specified document or transaction (not including taxes).
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Total amount displays the total of all lines in document currency

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: UOM
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A non monetary unit of measure.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: M_Product_ID
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.
